cards.headline: A_B vs B_B shows higher macro F1 (mean diff +0.0060, supplementary adjusted p=0.0027).
cards.what_it_means: Strong/moderate strength claims are recommended for the main report. Weak/exploratory results should remain in the appendix.
cards.how_to_read: Interpret the sign of mean_diff relative to the comparison label. A positive diff means the second condition exceeds the first.

cards.headline: A_R vs D_R shows higher macro F1 (mean diff +0.0090, supplementary adjusted p=0.0417).

cards.how_to_read: Interpret the sign of mean_diff relative to the comparison label. A positive diff means the second condition exceeds the first.

cards.headline: D_B vs D_R shows lower macro F1 (mean diff -0.0093, supplementary adjusted p=0.0090).
